description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the dealii/dealii:master-focal Docker image and runs a before_script for every job that sets D=/builds/luca-heltai/bare-dealii-app, changes to that directory, and executes ./scripts/check_indentation.sh. Add a debug job (default stage) that runs the before_script, deletes any existing build_linux_debug directory, creates a new build_linux_debug directory, runs cmake .. -GNinja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug; ninja, then executes ctest -N followed by ctest --output-on-failure. Add a release job (default stage) that also runs the before_script, removes any existing build_linux_release directory, creates a new build_linux_release directory, runs cmake .. -GNinja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release; ninja, and finally runs ctest -N and ctest --output-on-failure. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
